CREATE TABLE businesses (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), category VARCHAR(255), location VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO businesses (id, name, category, location, created_at) VALUES (1, 'Business A', 'Category 1', 'Location 1', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO businesses (id, name, category, location, created_at) VALUES (2, 'Business B', 'Category 2', 'Location 2', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO businesses (id, name, category, location, created_at) VALUES (3, 'Business C', 'Category 1', 'Location 1', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO businesses (id, name, category, location, created_at) VALUES (4, 'Business D', 'Category 3', 'Location 3', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO businesses (id, name, category, location, created_at) VALUES (5, 'Business E', 'Category 2', 'Location 2', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM businesses WHERE category IN (SELECT DISTINCT category FROM businesses WHERE location = 'Location 2') AND created_at >= '2023-01-01 00:00:00';
SELECT * FROM businesses WHERE location = (SELECT location FROM businesses WHERE id = 1) AND name LIKE 'Business%';
SELECT b1.name FROM businesses b1 JOIN businesses b2 ON b1.category = b2.category WHERE b1.name != b2.name AND b1.location = 'Location 1';
SELECT b1.name, COUNT(*) FROM businesses b1 JOIN businesses b2 ON b1.category = b2.category GROUP BY b1.name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM businesses WHERE created_at < (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM businesses WHERE category = 'Category 1');
SELECT DISTINCT location FROM businesses WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM businesses WHERE name LIKE '%Business%') ORDER BY location DESC;
SELECT name FROM businesses WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM businesses WHERE location = 'Location 3') AND category = 'Category 1';
